# PHIL.035 ? Vaisheshika

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** vaisheshika

**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Atomism; categories of reality (substance, quality, action, etc.); particularist ontology; natural causation

## Application
Analyze reality through categorical distinctions; recognize atomic composition; natural causal explanations; systematic classification

## Key Values
- Categorical analysis
- Atomistic ontology
- Natural causation
- Classification
